provisions.content:
ORGANIC PRODUCTION AND LABELLING OF
ORGANIC PRODUCTS

[ L.S.427.93

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 427.93
REGOLAMENTI DWAR ORGANIC PRODUCTION
AND LABELLING OF ORGANIC PRODUCTS*
12 ta’ Jannar, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 15 tal-2018.

Dawn ir-regolamenti saru bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew trasposti għall-Kap.639, Ara L.S. 639.05. Ara Att XXXIII
tal-2023.
